title: IDWant
description: IDWant it! Unregisters recipes through it's config.
body:
IDWant it! Unregister/Remove the recipes for base game items through the config. 

config.yml example
```
# IDWant! Get it?

# Put recipe names you want to *remove* here. (Vanilla Items)
Recipes:
  - hopper
  - golden_apple
  - diamond_sword
```
